content.en:
"Find another primeval source crystal!"

Ye Tian collected this primeval source crystal.

In this primeval forbidden realm, he searched for resources as an primeval beast and encountered very few troubles.

Although the primeval murderous creatures will also fight each other, the situation is better, as long as they want to escape, they will hardly chase and kill.

But those Bone Transformation Realm existences are all outsiders, once they enter here, they will naturally be targeted by the Ancient Forbidden Realm, and they will also be targeted by the Ancient Evil Objects, and they instinctively want to kill the existence of the Bone Transformation Realm.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian used the primeval murderous object to copy the body to constantly find the primeval source crystal, and after finding the primeval source crystal, he let the replica body take out of the primeval forbidden domain.

Wanlong territorial waters.

Ye Tian took out the primeval source crystals he had collected and cultivated them.

"Let's try the effect of the Ancient Source Crystal!"

Ye Tian swallowed a primeval source crystal and refined the energy of the primeval source crystal to refine his immeasurable bones.

The three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones in his body have already completed a bone transformation, and now he is going to temper it again, striving to make the immeasurable bones undergo a second bone transformation again.

Only when the immeasurable bones of the whole body have completed the secondary bone transformation, then they can break through to the secondary bone transformation realm.

Before, he had been cultivating for a long time, and he hadn't even completed the second bone transformation with an immeasurable bone.

He began to use the Ancient Source Crystal to continuously refine one of the Infinite Bone, and this Infinite Bone continued to grow stronger under the tempering of the Ancient Source Crystal.

The years passed, and after a period of time, this immeasurable bone had finally completed the second bone transformation, and a primeval source crystal had not yet been used up.

"With less than one Ancient Source Crystal, one immeasurable bone can be quenched to the second bone transformation, but if you want to complete the secondary bone transformation of all three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones, you must need more immeasurable bones, because it must be very difficult for the last few immeasurable bones to complete the secondary bone transformation!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, by collecting more primeval source crystals, he could raise his cultivation to the second bone transformation realm.

During the years when he was refining the primeval source crystals, he found some more primeval source crystals.

There are still quite a few primeval source crystals bred in the primeval forbidden realm, but they are relatively difficult to find.

But with time, you can still find it.

In the following years, the primeval forbidden realm was more chaotic, and one by one primeval murderous objects were born, resulting in more and more primeval murderous objects in the primeval forbidden realm, and they began to fight and kill constantly.

This is also the process that every primeval treasure must go through, and many bone transformation realms are also very clear.

At this time, even the Lord of the Chaos Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void did not dare to stay in the Ancient Forbidden Domain, and ran out one by one.

The other Bone Transformation Realm existences naturally came out of the Ancient Forbidden Domain, and they waited for the chaos in the Ancient Forbidden Domain to end before entering the Ancient Forbidden Domain.

And at this time.

It seems that he is the only one in the entire Ancient Forbidden Domain who is still here, of course, he only uses the primeval murder to copy the body action, but he is also surrounded and killed by the top primeval murderous object at every turn, and then copies a top primeval murderous object.

In this way, Ye Tian could still find the Taigu Source Crystal from time to time.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's immeasurable bones completed the secondary bone transformation, and his strength was slowly increasing.

However, as long as there is no breakthrough to the secondary bone transformation, the overall strength improvement will not be obvious.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

"Three hundred and sixty immeasurable bones have completed the second bone transformation!"

At this time, Ye Tian had already used up three hundred Primeval Source Crystals.

And he still has more than 1,000 primeval source crystals on his body, which he has slowly found over the years.

"With so many primeval source crystals, they must have steadily completed the secondary bone transformation of my last five immeasurable bones!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If he couldn't complete the second bone transformation like this, he believed that others would definitely not be able to complete it either.

I saw that he took out the primeval source crystals one by one and refined them, and it took him more than thirty primeval source crystals to complete the second bone transformation of one of the immeasurable bones.

Then, he continued to refine the Ancient Source Crystal in this way.

In this way, one of his immeasurable bones completed the second bone transformation.

"There is only one last immeasurable bone left!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

If this immeasurable bone also completes the secondary bone transformation, he can break through to the secondary bone transformation realm.

But with the consumption of the primeval source crystals, he found that the last point could not be refined no matter what.

In other words, this immeasurable bone has been tempered to the last point, and it has reached the extreme.

"Bottleneck!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

He is now tempered to the extreme of a bone transformation realm, and he has encountered the last bit of bottleneck, which is normal.

He also knew that there was such a bottleneck, so he was not surprised.

"It's very difficult to break the bottleneck with the primeval source crystal cultivation for the time being!"

Ye Tian decided to use the old method, that is, to break the bottleneck by fighting.

At present, the suitable place for him to fight is naturally the Ancient Forbidden Domain.

......

The Primeval Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian's true body copied his body and came here, and as soon as he entered, he was attacked by the primeval beast.

Soon after, his replica body was killed.

But.

After that, he copied his real body again, and fought the primeval beasts here again.

Fighting again and again, falling again and again.

But Ye Tian didn't give up at all, and only this method could let him break the shackles as soon as possible!

The years passed, and before I knew it, the number of primeval murderous creatures in the primeval forbidden realm was much less, and they all fell in the constant fighting.

And the energy of these fallen primeval beasts feeds back into the primeval forbidden realm, which will allow the primeval forbidden realm to give birth to more resources.

After a long time, all the primeval murderous creatures may be killed or fall, and then some primeval races will be born.

This is the case with the ancient treasure land in the territorial sea boundary sea, and this is also the process that the ancient treasure land has to go through.

And the primeval forbidden realm, this primeval treasure land, is very powerful, if it really gives birth to the primeval race, it is definitely not weak.

this day.

When Ye Tian was fighting with the primeval murderous creatures, he suddenly felt that the last bit of shackles was about to be broken.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fell into a frantic battle, using the madness of the battle to tear through the last shackles and bottlenecks.

Click!!!

The shackles in the darkness seemed to be torn apart at the moment when the replica body fell.

......

Wanlong territorial waters.

Ye Tian began to impact the Second Bone Transformation Realm, and he took out the Ancient Source Crystals to cultivate.

Click!

The bottleneck is really broken.

The last bit of immeasurable bone is refined little by little.

Finally, the last immeasurable bone completed the secondary bone transformation.
